title: Original Horse Armor Recipes
description: Are you tired of never finding Iron, Gold, or Diamond horse armor?
body:
# Original Horse Armor Recipes

This is just a simple recipe data pack, nothing special.

**13w16a**; Added horse armor. Horse armor can be crafted using the following recipe. **13w18a**; The crafting recipe for horse armor has been removed.Horse armor can now be found in chests in jungle & desert temples, dungeons, nether fortresses, stronghold altar rooms and village blacksmith buildings. Iron horse armor can now additionally be found in mineshaft chests.

6 Iron, Gold, or Diamond and 1 wool of your choosing will get you some horse armor! Just follow the recipe below!

**Side Note**: The game will most likely tell you that the data pack is out of data depending on the version you are choosing to play but it works just fine 1.13-1.20

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/add829d6d1b53a7ccc7c87a426247579e05ed79a.png)
